description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition White kurta with maroon and green traditional print, made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, short hooked placket, short sleeves with piping and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This elegant kurti from vishudh is designed to accentuate your femininity with it's timeless cuts, offering a flattering silhouette. Look stylish and ethnic in this kurti, and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
